name: nimble_agents_run
description:
Execute an agent against a target URL or set of parameters.

Returns structured data collected from the target page. The params dict must
match the agent's input_schema — use nimble_agents_get to inspect required fields.

Typical workflow: list → get (check input_schema) → run with params.

Args:
    agent_name: Agent name from list, get, or generate results.
    params: Input parameters matching the agent's input_schema.

Returns:
    Records in data.results, plus source URL and agent name.

Possible issues if no results are returned:
- The target URL may be unreachable or behind a login wall.
- The page structure may have changed since the agent was created.
- Required params may be missing or malformed — check the agent's input_schema.

params.description: Runtime input parameters built from the agent's input_schema. Include all required keys. Example: {"url": "https://www.amazon.com/dp/B09V3KXJPB"}
params.title: Params

agent_name.description: Agent name from nimble_agents_list, nimble_agents_get, or nimble_agents_generate.
agent_name.title: Agent Name

session_id.description: Session/thread ID for running an unpublished workflow. Use instead of agent_name for agents not yet published.
session_id.title: Session Id

data.description: Structured output; currently exposes parsed `results`. May be null when the run fails or returns no parsed records.

url.description: Source URL used by the agent (from backend response or run params).
url.title: Url

agent_name.description: Agent name that was executed (may be None for unpublished workflows).
agent_name.title: Agent Name

error.description: Error message from the backend, if any.
error.title: Error

RunAgentData.description: Nested result data returned by nimble_agents_run on success.

results.description: Parsed result rows from backend `data.parsing`. Each item is one record.
results.title: Results

RunAgentData.title: RunAgentData
